question: Based on the chart, which income group has the highest customer share in the final year shown?

options.A: The high-income group holds the largest share of customers.
options.B: The low-income group holds the largest share of customers.
options.C: Cannot determine which income group has the largest share without a legend explaining which color represents each income level.
options.D: The middle-income group holds the largest share of customers.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
